title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Queen, Unknown person #14, Kozuki Alliance, Orochi as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: together with seven of the red scabbards, one Ninja, and one leading figure... they depart in silence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THEY WALK UPON THE WITHERED EARTH... THE LAND'S HOLOW CRIES RING- ING OUT LIKE THE WINTER FROST.*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: THE DAZLING SUN BURNS BRIGHTLY...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sparse streaks of clouds strewn across the heavens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years past... Burdened with the weight of being unable to avenge their master, they wander across these lands as ghosts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sun illuminates their figures, burning nine deep shadows into the barren ground.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we emerge victorious, we will make sure to build them grander graves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Boy... are you getting used to Emma?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That sword you wield, the Sandai Kitetsu, is my creation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Really!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They are similar in that neither can be yielded by the weak...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the main reason that you are getting used to it so quickly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is because that white sword, the wado Ichimonji, and Emma...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were made by the same person!! His name was Shimotsuki Kouzaburou.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He left this country illegally over 50 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, well... as long as I can suppress it, it will be okay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare he do something so untrust- worthy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perhaps Lady Hyogorori noticed that blade of yours, which prompted her to give you her father's keepsake.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Emma has yet to become a black blade!! In your hands, I am sure it will reach that level.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi sh

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just you wait, kaidou.

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: UDon is fine?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes, there are no problems at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: Hm, was that a false report...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "So, it has changed from port habu to port toKage...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kozuki Hiyori is alive...!! At the northern graveyard, hm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Get ready!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: With clear blue skies...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and cherry blossoms scattering across the flower capital...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The curtains finally fall on the day of the fire festival.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Move out of the way!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: The Shogun procession is passing through!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The war that will shake the fate of the world itself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Will now begin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wano Country Act Two

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
